question_tagalog: Ano ang una mong nararamdaman tuwing nagkakaroon tayo ng misunderstanding?
question_english: What do you first feel whenever we have a misunderstanding?
quote_tagalog: Pasensya na paminsan may sumpong ako.
quote_english: Sorry for being moody sometimes.

question_tagalog: Mas gusto mo bang mag-usap agad o kailangan mo ng cool down time pag nag-aaway tayo?
question_english: Do you prefer talking immediately or need cool-down time when we argue?
quote_tagalog: Bigyan natin space ang isa't isa bago mag-usap.
quote_english: Let's give each other space before talking.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi kong ginagawa na hindi mo lang sinasabing nakakainis na?
question_english: What do I always do that you just don't say is already annoying?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin mo lahat bago pa maging away.
quote_english: Tell me everything before it turns into a fight.

question_tagalog: Pano ko mas mapaparamdam sayo na naiintindihan kita tuwing nag-e-explain ka?
question_english: How can I make you feel that I understand you when you explain?
quote_tagalog: Nakikinig ako kahit tahimik lang.
quote_english: I'm listening even if I'm just quiet.

question_tagalog: Sinong mas madalas mag-sorry unang satin dalawa?
question_english: Who apologizes first more often between us two?
quote_tagalog: Sorry na, bati na tayo please.
quote_english: I'm sorry, let's make up please.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang pinaka ayaw mong naririnig sakin during an argument?
question_english: What word do you hate hearing the most from me during an argument?
quote_tagalog: Ingatan natin ang mga salitang bibitawan natin.
quote_english: Let's be careful with the words we release.

question_tagalog: Pano mo pini-process yung galit mo sakin without hurting my feelings?
question_english: How do you process your anger without hurting my feelings?
quote_tagalog: Mas mahalaga ka kaysa galit ko.
quote_english: You are more important than my anger.

question_tagalog: Tuwing kailan mo naramdaman na invalid yung feelings mo para sakin?
question_english: When did you feel that your feelings were invalid to me?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng nararamdaman mo valid sakin.
quote_english: Every feeling you have is valid to me.

question_tagalog: Ano yung isang argument natin na feeling mo hindi pa talaga na-resolve hanggang ngayon?
question_english: What is one argument we had that you feel isn't truly resolved until now?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko tapos na tayo sa nakaraan.
quote_english: I want us to be done with the past.

question_tagalog: Pag nag-aaway tayo in public, pano mo gustong i-handle natin?
question_english: When we fight in public, how do you want us to handle it?
quote_tagalog: Sa bahay na natin ayusin lahat nang mahinahon.
quote_english: Let's fix everything calmly at home.

question_tagalog: Anong the best way para mapakalma kita pag nagagalit ka sakin?
question_english: What's the best way to calm you down when you get mad at me?
quote_tagalog: Isang mahigpit na yakap lang kailangan ko.
quote_english: Just one tight hug is what I need.

question_tagalog: Sino yung mas madalas mang-gaslight ng di sinasadya satin?
question_english: Who unconsciously gaslights more often between us?
quote_tagalog: Sorry na if misan mali pagka-deliver ko.
quote_english: Sorry if sometimes my delivery is wrong.

question_tagalog: Bakit minsan pinipili mo magtampo kaysa sabihin agad?
question_english: Why do you sometimes choose to sulk rather than tell me instantly?
quote_tagalog: Wag na magkimkim, andito naman ako.
quote_english: Don't hold it in, I'm here anyway.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin na hirap na hirap kang intindihin?
question_english: Is there a part of me that you have a hard time understanding?
quote_tagalog: I-explain ko nang mabuti sayo palagi.
quote_english: I will explain it clearly to you always.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-lesson learned mo every time we resolve an issue?
question_english: What's your biggest lesson learned every time we resolve an issue?
quote_tagalog: Mas nagpapatibay satin ang bawat tampuhan.
quote_english: Every petty fight makes us stronger.

question_tagalog: Pag nagbanta nakong makipag-break dala ng galit, ano reaksyon mo?
question_english: If I threaten to break up out of anger, what's your reaction?
quote_tagalog: Wag natin bibitawan ang isa't isa dahil lang sa away.
Let's not let go of each other just because of a fight.

question_tagalog: Pano mo inaalam na okay nako after ng intense argument natin?
question_english: How do you check if I'm okay after our intense argument?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko papapaliitin ang problema mo.
quote_english: I won't downplay your problem.

question_tagalog: Sino ang mas stubborn pagdating sa pagtanggap ng mistakes?
question_english: Who is more stubborn when it comes to accepting mistakes?
quote_tagalog: Ibaba natin yung pride para sa atin.
quote_english: Let's put down our pride for us.

question_tagalog: Pag tumaas boses ko, natatakot ka ba o naiinis lalo?
question_english: When I raise my voice, do you get scared or more annoyed?
quote_tagalog: Hihinaan na natin para maliwanag.
quote_english: We'll soften our voices so it's clear.

question_tagalog: Ano ang limit mo when it comes to teasing and jokes from me?
question_english: What is your limit when it comes to teasing and jokes from me?
quote_tagalog: Patawarin mo sana ang mga biro kong nakakasakit.
quote_english: Please forgive my jokes that hurt you.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba hinahawakan kita pag pinapaliwanagan kita during fight?
question_english: Do you want me touching you while explaining during a fight?
quote_tagalog: Kinokomfort lang kita dahil naiinis ka sakin.
quote_english: I'm just comforting you because you're annoyed at me.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang laging ginagamit ko pag defensive ako na hate mo?
question_english: What word do I always use when defensive that you hate?
quote_tagalog: Aayusin ko ang pagdedeliver sa suunod.
quote_english: I will fix the delivery next time.

question_tagalog: Pano natin mai-improve yung active listening tuwing nagtatalo tayo?
question_english: How can we improve our active listening whenever we argue?
quote_tagalog: Pakikinggan kita with an open heart.
quote_english: I will listen to you with an open heart.

question_tagalog: Saan galing yung insecurities mo pag feeling mo we're falling apart?
question_english: Where do your insecurities stem from when you feel we're falling apart?
quote_tagalog: Wala kayang pipigil sating magsama.
quote_english: Nothing can stop us from being together.

question_tagalog: Nakatulog ka na ba ng umiiyak ng patago dahil sakin?
question_english: Have you ever cried to sleep secretly because of me?
quote_tagalog: Sana wag ka na ulit umiyak dahil sakin.
quote_english: I hope you never cry because of me again.

question_tagalog: Pano natin maiiwasan yung silent treatment as a defense mechanism?
question_english: How do we prevent silent treatment as a defense mechanism?
quote_tagalog: Kausapin natin araw-araw nang maayos.
quote_english: Let's talk every day properly.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na ako talaga yung safe place mo after ng conflict natin?
question_english: When did you feel that I am really your safe place after our conflict?
quote_tagalog: Pagkatapos mag-away, yakap na ulit tayo.
quote_english: After fighting, let's hug again.

question_tagalog: Ano yung trigger mo in arguments na hindi ko madalas napapansin?
question_english: What's your trigger in arguments that I don't usually notice?
quote_tagalog: Iintindihin na kita with extra care.
quote_english: I will understand you with extra care.

question_tagalog: Kinukwestyon mo ba yung love ko pag sobrang dami nating tampuhan for a week?
question_english: Do you question my love when we have too much misunderstanding for a week?
quote_tagalog: Kahit mag-away tayo ng ilang araw, mahal parin kita.
quote_english: Even if we fight for days, I still love you.

question_tagalog: Sino yung unang nag-o-open up to fix the conflict?
question_english: Who is the first one to open up to fix the conflict?
quote_tagalog: Tayo mismong dalawa, team tayo dito.
quote_english: Us two, we are a team here.

question_tagalog: Pwede bang i-promise natin na hindi matutulog nang di ayos?
question_english: Can we promise not to sleep without making up?
quote_tagalog: Aayusin natin to bago pumikit.
quote_english: We'll fix this before closing our eyes.

question_tagalog: Pano ko maiiwasang ma-misinterpret mga text messages mo pag galit ka?
question_english: How do I avoid misinterpreting your text messages when you're mad?
quote_tagalog: Tatawagan na lang kita para maliwanag.
quote_english: I'll just call you so it's clear.

question_tagalog: Ano feeling mo pag sinabi kong nagbago nako dahil sayo pero nakita mong hindi?
question_english: How do you feel when I said I changed for you but you see I didn't?
quote_tagalog: Sasamahan kita as we change together.
quote_english: I'll join you as we change together.

question_tagalog: Sino mas ma-pride satin pagdating sa pag aming nagkamali?
question_english: Who is more full of pride when admitting mistakes?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang pride basta sa relasyon natin.
quote_english: No more pride when it comes to our relationship.

question_tagalog: Pano natin matutulungan yung isa't isa to communicate effectively?
question_english: How do we help each other communicate effectively?
quote_tagalog: Always give assurance habang nagpapaliwanag.
quote_english: Always give assurance while explaining.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang pag malapit na period mo, we easily get into conflicts?
question_english: Why does it seem we easily get into conflicts when your period is near?
quote_tagalog: Naiintindihan ko moods mo kahit ano mangyari.
quote_english: I understand your moods no matter what happens.

question_tagalog: Na-feel mo na ba minsan that I am not fighting for us enough?
question_english: Have you ever felt I am not fighting for us enough?
quote_tagalog: Ipaglalaban kita hanggang patong dalawa.
quote_english: I will fight for you until it's just the two of us.

question_tagalog: Anong the best thing to do pagnapuno nakong naiinis sayo pero mahal padin kita?
question_english: What's the best thing to do when I'm extremely annoyed at you but still love you?
quote_tagalog: Bigyan muna kita ng pahinga para mag-isip.
quote_english: I'll give you rest to think first.

question_tagalog: Pag nasigawan ba kita nang di sinasadya, madali ba kong i-patawad sayo?
question_english: If I accidentally shout at you, is it easy to forgive me?
quote_tagalog: Pagpasensyahan mo ko minsan nai-stress out din ako.
quote_english: Bare with me sometimes I get stressed out too.

question_tagalog: Kailan kita pinaka-nararamdaman pag pinaparamdam mo ang sympathy during conflict?
question_english: When do I feel you the most when showing sympathy during a conflict?
quote_tagalog: Hawakan natin kamay ng isat isa habang galit pa.
quote_english: Let's hold hands while still mad.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi kong dinadahilan that you desperately want me to stop doing?
question_english: What do I constantly make as an excuse that you desperately want me to stop doing?
quote_tagalog: Tatanggapin ko ang consequences lahat lahat.
quote_english: I will accept the consequences wholly.

question_tagalog: Pano ko maitatama yung feeling mo na lagi kitang iniinvalidate?
question_english: How can I correct your feeling that I always invalidate you?
quote_tagalog: Pananatilihin kong safe ang emotions mo dito.
quote_english: I will keep your emotions safe here.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging subject sa school yung communication natin, anong grade natin?
question_english: If our communication was a school subject, what's our grade?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko uno palagi para sayo.
quote_english: I want top grades always for you.

question_tagalog: Bakit pag ikaw yung nagtampo, ikaw din nagsu-suyo the next day?
question_english: Why is it that when you sulk, you're the one making amends the next day?
quote_tagalog: Mahina ako pagdating sayo araw araw.
quote_english: I get weak when it comes to you every day.

question_tagalog: Pano napupunta sa malaking issue agad yung maliit na asaran?
question_english: How do small teasing immediately turn into a big issue?
quote_tagalog: Wag natin ipon-ipin yung galit sa dibdib.
quote_english: Let's not pile up the anger in our chests.

question_tagalog: Pano ko maipapakita sayo na willing akong mag-adjust in conflicts?
question_english: How can I show you I am willing to adjust in conflicts?
quote_tagalog: Aksiyon na yung gagawin ko imbis salita.
quote_english: I will do actions instead of words.

question_tagalog: May away ba tayo na nakatulong sa relasyon natin greatly?
question_english: Have we had a fight that helped our relationship greatly?
quote_tagalog: Bawat away lalong nabubuo yung pag-ibig ko.
quote_english: In every fight, my love shapes completely.

question_tagalog: Saan natin nakukuha yung tigas ng ulo natin parehas minsan?
question_english: Where do we get our stubbornness both sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Palalambutin ng pag-ibig ang ulo nating dalawa.
quote_english: Our love will soften our stubborn heads.

question_tagalog: Pano natin matapos yung cycle ng pagiging defensive instead maging open?
question_english: How do we end the cycle of being defensive instead of being open?
quote_tagalog: Tanggalin ang walls natin sa isa't isa.
quote_english: Let's take down our walls for each other.

question_tagalog: Sino yung mas mahaba ang pasensya in general?
question_english: Who has longer patience in general?
quote_tagalog: Hahaba pa ito dahil araw araw kitang kasama.
quote_english: It will stretch longer because I'm with you every day.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin that reminds you of your past traumatic relationships?
question_english: Is there a part of me that reminds you of your past traumatic relationships?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko ipaparanas yung pinagdaanan mo dati.
quote_english: I won't let you experience what you went through before.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ihahandle if the conflict involves your family and me?
question_english: How will you handle it if the conflict involves your family and me?
quote_tagalog: Babalansehin ko yung family ko and pamilya na natin.
quote_english: I will balance my family and our family.

question_tagalog: Anong the best advice na nabasa mo on how couples understand each other completely?
question_english: What's the best advice you read on how couples understand each other completely?
quote_tagalog: Pag-ibig muna bago pride in dealing problems.
quote_english: Love first before pride in dealing problems.

question_tagalog: Pag sobrang overthink ako tuwing magaaway tayo, pano moko iko-comfort?
question_english: When I overthink too much during a fight, how do you comfort me?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang magpapatahan ng overthinking mo.
quote_english: I will quiet your overthinking down.

question_tagalog: Kung in fairness is at play, sinong usually the biased one sa away natin?
question_english: If fairness is at play, who usually is the biased one in our arguments?
quote_tagalog: Kahit bias ko yung sarili ko, ikaw panalo palagi.
quote_english: Even if I bias myself, you always win.

question_tagalog: Ano ang indicator na I really mean it pag sinabi kong nagbago nako?
question_english: What is the indicator that I really mean it when I say I've changed?
quote_tagalog: Trust the process ng growth and understanding ko.
quote_english: Trust the process of my growth and understanding.

question_tagalog: Pano if the problem doesn't have an immediate solution at all?
question_english: What if the problem doesn't have an immediate solution at all?
quote_tagalog: I-endure natin ito ng magka holding hands as usual.
quote_english: Let's endure this holding hands as usual.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang the peacekeeper sa inis nating parehas?
question_english: Who between us is the peacekeeper when we're both annoyed?
quote_tagalog: Sabay natin pipiliin ang peace for a lasting relationship.
quote_english: We will together choose peace for a lasting relationship.

question_tagalog: Ano yung the deepest understanding that we reached accidentally due to conflict?
question_english: What's the deepest understanding that we reached accidentally due to conflict?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng problema natin kaya malutas in seconds pag kalmado.
quote_english: All our problems can be solved in seconds when calm.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang minsan yung pagresolba natin requires more cuddling rather than conversation?
question_english: Why does solving our issues sometimes require more cuddling rather than conversation?
quote_tagalog: Words are not enough minsan; we really need touch and love.
quote_english: Words are not enough sometimes; we really need touch and love.
